mustacheWeatherMessages.highHumidity: Perfect mustache weather! The humidity will keep your facial hair naturally moisturized and easier to style. A light application of wax will hold beautifully in these conditions.
mustacheWeatherMessages.precipitation: Rainy day mustache alert! Keep your 'stache dry under cover and consider a waterproof wax to maintain your style. A quick touch-up after the rain will have you looking distinguished again.
mustacheWeatherMessages.pleasant: Ideal conditions for showcasing your mustache! Low humidity and clear skies mean your carefully crafted style will hold all day. Perfect weather for outdoor mustache competitions or photography sessions.
